truths: What's the weirdest food you've ever eaten?

dares: Talk like a robot until your next turn.
Pretend to be a news anchor reporting on this party.
Do the worm or your best attempt at it.
Make a hat out of something nearby and wear it for two rounds.
Act like a chicken until someone says stop.
Give everyone in the room a unique handshake.
Balance a book on your head and walk across the room.
Speak in slow motion for one minute.
Do your best evil villain laugh three times.
Pretend the floor is lava for 30 seconds.
Make up a song about the person to your right.
Do an interpretive dance to no music.
Try to lick your elbow.
Act out brushing your teeth in the most dramatic way possible.
Pretend you're underwater for the next minute.
Do 15 seconds of air guitar as passionately as possible.
Make three different animal sounds in a row.
Walk backwards everywhere you go for two rounds.
Give a dramatic toast to an inanimate object.
Pretend to be a mime trapped in a box for 30 seconds.
Do your best celebrity impression.
Talk with your tongue sticking out for one round.
Pretend to be a sports commentator narrating the room.
Draw a portrait of another player with your eyes closed.
Do a cartwheel or a somersault — or a very enthusiastic roll.
Compliment yourself in the third person for 30 seconds.
